name: Edvard Grieg
abstract: Edvard Hagerup Grieg ( GREEG, Norwegian: [ˈɛdvaʁd ˈhɑ̀ːɡəʁʉp ˈɡʁɪgː]; 15 June 1843 – 4 September 1907) was a Norwegian composer and pianist. He is widely considered one of the leading Romantic era composers, and his music is part of the standard classical repertoire worldwide.

about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] They played all of the -- Edward Grieg's thing they would swing them, you know. [INTERVIEWEE] I know.
